div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Chargé in Great Britain (Laughlin)The same, on the same date, to the Embassy in Spain (for Chadbourne, No. 404); and to Legations in Denmark (for Hurley), the Netherlands (for Edwards, No. 138), Norway (for Dye, No. 140), Sweden (for Owen, No. 126), and Switzerland (for Dresel, No. 202).
div.p: For Sheldon [from War Trade Board]: No. 1845. Circular No. 24, dated July 24,Not printed. has been withdrawn. Representatives here of the neutral countries in Europe have been advised that purchases may now be made in the United States without restriction as to the obtaining of a license before purchase is made.
